description: A compliance manager needs to update the organization's risk appetite configuration in Eramba (http://localhost:8080, Login: admin / Admin2024!) following a board-level risk governance review. Update the risk appetite settings for Enterprise Risks (Risks), Third Party Risks (ThirdPartyRisks), and Business Continuity Risks (BusinessContinuities) by changing the appetite value from 3 to 2 for each. Maintain the risk appetite method as simple threshold mode (value 0) and the risk calculation method as 'eramba' across all three domains.
